case_title: YOLANDA ATIENZA VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2007 CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
